project.name: portofolio
project.domain: Premium creative personal portfolio for a UI/UX designer and creative developer showcasing elite visual and frontend skills.
project.runtimeConstraint: Vue 3, Vite, Tailwind v3, Lenis smooth scroll, GSAP animation orchestration.
project.architectureConstraint: Single-page responsive layout structured as fluid, kinetic glassmorphic modules. Clean, professional copywriting without esoteric or eccentric terminology, backed by highly polished scroll-driven motions and floating backdrops.

confirmedAssumptions: User explicitly rejected the esoteric room/catalog naming conventions and requested standard, clear portfolio page sections (Home, About, Works, Skills, Experience, Contact).
The portfolio must showcase elite visual taste and look genuinely designed to the teeth, utilizing highly active but structured micro-animations and kinetic scrolling.
Borders are represented as fine, sharp neon glass rules that glow on hover. No muddy dropshadows are allowed.

visualResetStrategy.previousAnchor: Risograph Indie Zine & Interactive Graphic Collage (v4)
discardedFromPrevious: Catalog issues and print plates metadata labels
Tactile paper stickers and textured zine pulp margins
preservedAsContentEvidence: Vite, Lenis, and GSAP technical scaffolding
regressionTestCriteria: Must not display any 'room' or 'catalog' naming in page headers, sections, or labels.
Must use highly standard navigation paths (Home, About, Works, Skills, Experience, Contact).
Layout elements must float as premium glassmorphic cards with responsive kinetic boundaries.
Vibrant background blobs must drift fluidly in the background, creating a high-end agency aesthetic.

visualDirection.name: Kinetic Grid Shift & Liquid Glassmorphism
visualDirection.summary: A premium, fluid, and highly interactive layout where sections are structured as glass modules floating over a dark obsidian or warm alabaster backdrop, populated by drifting liquid gradients and interactive spring-physics grids.
visualDirection.firstViewportBet: A massive, tightly-tracked header FARID EKA APRILIAN overlapping a sleek frosted glass panel. Colorful fluid gradient blobs hover and morph in the background. Navigating triggers fluid active glass border transitions.
distinctiveMoves: Frosted glass modules with custom oklch border glows and blur backdrops.
Drifting fluid gradient background blobs animating dynamically.
Interactive grids (works, skills, experience) that scale and react to cursor proximity using GSAP and spring mechanics.

motionPaletteDecision.decision: Fluid kinetic transitions. Navigation triggers smooth scroll scrolling with focus centering. Hovering over cards triggers kinetic spring scaling and glass border highlights.
motionPaletteDecision.densityDecisionSource: User explicitly requested a normal portfolio layout but with a new concept, high visual impact, and full animations.
motionPaletteDecision.spatialDecision: Obsidian/Alabaster canvas hosting floating modular sections: home-section, about-section, works-grid, skills-section, experience-timeline, and contact-card.

locked: Normal page navigation naming: Home, About, Works, Skills, Experience, Contact
Voice triplet: Inter variable display / JetBrains Mono coordinates / Fraunces variable italic quotes
Frosted glassmorphism panels with oklch border glows
Zero dark-as-invert rules; dual mode palettes are derived separately
flexible: Exact size and speed of background blobs
Border glow intensity and gradient offsets
Spring scale factors on mobile to preserve touch stability

conceptualAnchor.name: Kinetic Grid Shift & Liquid Glassmorphism
conceptualAnchor.anchorReference: High-end creative digital agency sites featuring interactive glass surfaces, fluid background blobs, and spring-driven layout shifts
conceptualAnchor.specificReferencePoint: A sleek digital workspace built on frosted glass cards, glowing borders, modern fluid gradients, and tightly-tracked sans display headers.
conceptualAnchor.rationale: Perfectly satisfies the request for a normal, standard portfolio structure while maintaining high-end visual ambition, depth, and rich movement.
conceptualAnchor.signatureMotion: Floating gradient blob drifts, frosted border glows, spring module scaling, and fluid GSAP-coordinated module entry.
conceptualAnchor.typographicDecision: Inter variable drives display voice (giant headers, active navigation tags); JetBrains Mono drives specification voice (technical metadata, duration periods); Fraunces variable drives comment voice (humanized design remarks, italic quotes).
conceptualAnchor.visualRiskBudget: High aesthetic polish through frosted glassmorphism, drifting gradient shaders, and glowing borders; zero default card blocks.
conceptualAnchor.motionRiskBudget: High micro-interaction fluidity (magnetic spring, active glows) + Lenis smooth scroll; zero rigid system behaviors.

derivedTokenLogic.colorDerivationSource: Dark theme utilizes deep obsidian base with glowing electric cyan and indigo rules. Light theme utilizes clean alabaster base with glowing cobalt and magenta rules.
derivedTokenLogic.spacingDerivationSource: Modular glass panes layout, consistent spacing multipliers of 8px, and maximum line lengths of 60ch for readouts.
derivedTokenLogic.typographyDerivationSource: Inter bold display, JetBrains Mono details, and Fraunces elegant italic quotes.
derivedTokenLogic.motionDerivationSource: Spring physical transitions on hover, GSAP orchestration for entry reveals, and Lenis for inertia scroll.
derivedTokenLogic.typeScaleMethod: fluid clamp() with role-distinct steps; display 36-96px, body 15-17px, mono 11-13px
derivedTokenLogic.validationRule: No rooms or catalog copy. Every section must exist as an identifiable frosted glass container floating over a fluid animated canvas. Dropshadows are replaced by back blurs and subtle border lights.

aiSafeUiAudit.failureDefinition: A safe generic portfolio would render a 3-column white card grid with default margins, gray borders, and boring icons.
aiSafeUiAudit.interchangeabilityTest: Renaming this site to a boring administrative portal would break the glowing glass cards, kinetic grids, and animated background blobs.
requiredProductSpecificSignals: Frosted glass card panels with active oklch border glows.
Drifting fluid gradient blobs animating dynamically in the background.
Sleek target lines and target circles framing the portrait.
aiSafeUiAudit.backgroundPatternRule: No flat solids. The background hosts deep, glowing, and morphing gradient blobs.

productionContentPolicy.interimPhotographyHandling: Typeset vector grids show project monograms and metrics. Timeline items render clean career readouts.

tokenSystem.sourceOfTruth: docs/design-intent.json -> colorTruth, plus src/style.css :root and [data-theme] blocks
tokenSystem.implementationNote: Primitives defined once. Semantic roles switch by [data-theme]. Tailwind extend maps semantic names.

colorTruth.productSpecificBehavior: Light theme resembles alabaster glass with clean cobalt accents. Dark theme represents obsidian plates with electric cyan neon rules.

mutationRules.mobile: Single-column stack; glass cards merge borders; back blurs reduce slightly to preserve CPU speed; tags flow dynamically.
mutationRules.tablet: Two-column grids for project showcases; side notes stack inline.
mutationRules.desktop: Full fluid grids, interactive spring components, and drifting background blobs active.

micro.use: hover focus glass border glows and spring scales

motionSystem.plateReveal: Scroll-driven view timelines for module border drawings.
motionSystem.library: GSAP package used for once-per-session intro animations only.
motionSystem.reducedMotion: All background blob animations, GSAP timelines, and hover scales disabled; static glass panels operate perfectly.

rules: All depth is carried by frosted back blurs and subtle double-line glows. Drop shadows are banned.
Active buttons and links use spring physics on hover.
Section edges are outlined by oklch border rules that illuminate on hover.

accessibilityPolicy.focusVisibleSpec: 2px solid oklch(--accent), 4px offset, in both modes.

designExecutionPolicy.oldDesignRegressionTest: Design must avoid all room/catalog terminology. Leftover terracotta and zine pulp colors are entirely banned.

designExecutionHandoff.primaryExperienceGoal: Give the visitor the feeling of interacting with a state-of-the-art, beautifully animated developer portfolio, proving aesthetic taste and coding capabilities.

surfacePlan.goal: Introduce the designer-developer with bold headers, floating glass panels, and active cursor spring buttons.
Display designer commentary and philosophy paired with elegant serif typography and target grids.
Grid of selected works as glowing glass modules that expand into animated project cards.
Display technical skills as responsive floating capsules.
Vertical chronological timeline showing professional milestones.
Animated, glowing form allowing clients to reach out.

libraryDecisions.purpose: Philosophy log voice (designer reviews, personal footnotes, italicized notes).
System controls voice (oversized titles, buttons, primary labels).
Specification machine voice (dimension ticks, padding annotations, design tokens).

genericitySignals: card stacks without back blurs or animations
validBoldSignals: frosted glass cards with oklch active borders

taintedSources: v3 museum catalog terracotta colors and curatorial names
v4 zine pulp paper textures and offset print borders
contextHygiene.approvedExternalConstraintUsage: Adopt only the fluid, sleek kinetic grid visual concept. Do not copy external landing branding.

repoEvidence.designEvidenceSummary: Site integrates smoothly with GSAP and Lenis. Modular components map perfectly to the new grid shift layout.

metadata.freshnessRule: Research verified on 2026-05-27. Bypassed by explicit zero-based redesign.

previousAnchors.summary: Monographic show catalog: wall label, curator's note column, plate panel, floor plan, colophon (v3)
Risograph Indie Zine: misaligned offset print borders, tactile stickers, paper margins (v4)

previousPalettes.summary: Terracotta and slate-green curatorial exhibition catalog palette.
Risograph pink, teal, neon green zine color separation palette.

previousMotionSignatures.summary: Tactile sticker tilts and circular specs rotations.
